SEARCH
Package org.apache.pulsar.client.api.v5.internal

Interface PulsarClientProvider

public interface PulsarClientProvider
Service Provider Interface for the Pulsar client implementation.

The implementation module registers itself via META-INF/services using the standard Java ServiceLoader mechanism.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final class 
    PulsarClientProvider.Holder
    Lazy initialization holder for the provider singleton.
